results.title: WebAgent
results.description: WebAgent is a project by Alibaba Group's Tongyi Lab focused on information seeking, featuring models like WebShaper, WebSailor, WebDancer, and WebWalker for web traversal and data synthesis.

results.title: Browser-Agent
results.description: An AI agent for browser automation and web testing using Playwright, compliant with the Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocol.

results.title: Agent
results.description: A PHP user agent parser for desktop and mobile devices, offering Laravel support and enhanced functionality based on Mobile Detect.

results.title: AI Template Agent
results.description: A Python AI agent built with LangChain and OpenRouter that generates structured JSON templates via a FastAPI WebAPI.

results.title: Jido
results.description: Jido is a toolkit for building autonomous, distributed agent systems in Elixir, providing building blocks for creating advanced agentic systems with composable actions, state management, and OTP integration.

results.title: Agently
results.description: Agently is a Python framework designed to accelerate GenAI application development by providing an intuitive and efficient way to manage LLM outputs and integrate them with real-world applications.

results.title: Agent Browser
results.description: Agentic Browser is a powerful browser assistant with embedded AI capabilities, combining React, Tauri, and Node.js to answer questions about web pages and interact with content.

results.title: New Relic Ruby Agent
results.description: The New Relic Ruby agent monitors Ruby applications to identify and solve performance issues, and collect business data to improve customer experience and make data-driven business decisions.

results.title: app.build Agent
results.description: app.build Agent is an open-source AI agent that generates production-ready applications with testing, linting, and deployment setup from a single prompt.

results.title: Any Agent
results.description: AnyAgent provides a unified interface for using and evaluating various agent frameworks, supporting multiple popular frameworks like LangChain, LlamaIndex, and OpenAI Agents.

results.title: AgentHelm
results.description: AgentHelm is an AI agent framework that provides database-style transactional safety guarantees, including automatic rollbacks and human-in-the-loop approvals, to prevent failures and ensure consistent state in production environments.

results.title: AgentMap
results.description: AgentMap is a declarative orchestration framework that transforms CSV files into LangGraph AI agent workflows, enabling the creation of multi-agent systems, conversational interfaces, and document processing pipelines with minimal code.

results.title: Jido Signal
results.description: Jido.Signal is an Elixir toolkit for building event-driven and agent-based systems, providing a framework for defining, routing, dispatching, and tracking signals based on the CloudEvents specification.

results.title: Trae Agent
results.description: Trae Agent is an LLM-based agent for general purpose software engineering tasks, offering a CLI interface to understand natural language and execute complex workflows with various tools and LLM providers.

results.title: Agent Laboratory
results.description: Agent Laboratory is an end-to-end autonomous research workflow meant to assist you as the human researcher toward implementing your research ideas

results.title: Agente de Negócios
results.description: A Business Intelligence system built with Python, SQL Server, and Google Gemini API that provides interactive data insights and analysis through a Streamlit interface.

results.title: Tongyi DeepResearch
results.description: Tongyi DeepResearch is an agentic large language model developed by Tongyi Lab, designed for long-horizon, deep information-seeking tasks and demonstrating state-of-the-art performance across various agentic search benchmarks.

results.title: Agentic Data Analysis
results.description: An AI agent built in LangGraph that performs data analysis on a provided dataset, showcasing advanced LangGraph techniques.

results.title: .agent
results.description: .agent is a top-level domain and ecosystem designed for AI agents, enabling secure recognition, interaction, and interoperability within a trusted network.

results.title: Agentforce
results.description: Agentforce is the agent-driven layer of the Salesforce Platform, enabling the deployment of AI agents that work alongside employees to extend the workforce, serve customers 24/7, and build trusted, customizable AI assistants.

results.title: Agents JSON
results.description: Agents JSON is an open specification built on OpenAPI to formally describe contracts for API and agent interactions, enabling AI agents to reliably interact with APIs.

results.title: Agent Link
results.description: Agent Link is a Python library enabling AI agents to communicate over the internet using the MQTT protocol, facilitating distributed systems, multi-agent conversations, and human-agent interaction.

results.title: Agent Lightning
results.description: Agent Lightning is a trainer that enables optimizing AI agents with minimal code changes, supporting various agent frameworks and algorithms like Reinforcement Learning.

results.title: Reactive Agents
results.description: Reactive Agents is an elegant AI agent framework for building intelligent, autonomous agents with multiple reasoning strategies, comprehensive tool integration, and production-ready architecture.

results.title: Temporal AI Agent
results.description: A Temporal-based AI agent that conducts multi-turn conversations to achieve goals by executing native and MCP tools, supporting single and multi-agent modes.

results.title: Paragon (llmstxt)
results.description: Paragon Agency offers expert Amazon marketing and growth services, focusing on strategies like private label selling, the Amazon flywheel, and Amazon DSP to boost sales and conversions.

results.title: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore
results.description: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore is a comprehensive, enterprise-grade platform providing a Python SDK and Starter Toolkit for securely building, deploying, and managing scalable AI agent applications with zero infrastructure management.

results.title: AI Agent Service Toolkit
results.description: A comprehensive toolkit and template for building and running AI agent services using LangGraph, FastAPI, and Streamlit, providing a complete setup from agent definition to a chat-based user interface.

results.title: AgentLayer (llmstxt)
results.description: AgentLayer provides developer documentation for building and managing AI agents, including introductions to AgentHub and AgentStudio, and getting started guides for the AgentLayer SDK.
